race.comment: WOOTTON PLEASE (14) led and was game in defeat in heavy going over 1262m here two back. Dropped out over 1500m at Port Macquarie last time on a bottomless track. Better placed back to this trip and in a race weakened considerably by scratchings she can make a quick return to form. FASHION SPREE (9) is rarely far from the cash although she seems more effective on soft ground than heavy. Made some headway at Port Macquarie last time out in the same race as WOOTTON PLEASE. Should give a good account. Market watch on KOWLOON MAGNATE (4) for the Archibald stable first-up from a seven-month spell. Showed signs of improvement at the tail end of the maiden campaign and is likely to have made progress over the break. SACRED WELL (7) was easily accounted for on debut at Newcastle but this is far easier. SPARTAN STEEL (2) gets a pass mark for his debut at Port Macquarie recently. Worth including in exotics.
